subcodes.first_line: My love for Thee hath caused Me to remember Thee after Thou didst forget Me. I have entered the Most Great Prison by reason of that which I have wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حبی ایاک قد اقامنی علی ذکرک بعد الذی نسیتنی دخلت فی السجن الاعظم بما اکتسبت
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
